value.found_quote: Starting today, Antigravity CLI is available to everyone.
value.rationale: The page explicitly announces that Google is transitioning from Gemini CLI to Antigravity CLI as part of its "Google Antigravity" platform. It confirms that Antigravity CLI is generally available ("Starting today, Antigravity CLI is available to everyone"), and describes it as a brand-new terminal experience under Google's offering. The claim that Google offers Antigravity CLI is fully substantiated by this page.
